name: Trigger
content: Code connected to this block will play at the next measure when the associated button is pressed on the beat pad. This lets you play parts live as the track is playing. You can also press the "1" through "6" keys on your keyboard to trigger these buttons.

palette_params.name: trigger
palette_params.description: The number of the trigger button that, when pressed, will run this code

palette_params.name: trigger start
palette_params.description: When to start the triggered code

short_description: Play sounds when a button on the beat pad is pressed.
